title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!

analysis.drama_summary: 九天玄女穿越到醜女身上，嫁入豪門後用讀心術和法術逆襲翻盤，從被嫌棄的醜妻變成全家依賴的活祖宗，最終收服霸總老公、剷除反派。

structure.type: 多幕漸進式逆襲＋雙線交錯
structure.type_en: Progressive Multi-Act Revenge with Dual Plotlines
structure.description: 主線為女主從被嫌棄→展現能力→收服全家→擊敗反派的逆襲線；副線為反派蘇雲/童黛的陰謀線。兩線交織，女主每次化解危機都提升地位，反派每次出手都加速自身覆滅。結構上以'讀心術'為核心機制驅動劇情反轉，每段危機後都有甜寵段落調節節奏。
structure.act_breakdown: 第一幕（開場15%）：九天玄女被貶下凡、穿越到醜女身上、遭家人拋棄嫁入豪門；第二幕（發展30%）：霸總要離婚、車禍預言應驗、讀心術曝光童黛真面目；第三幕（中段25%）：收服婆婆和丈夫、甜寵互動、身體互換搞笑橋段；第四幕（高潮20%）：反派蘇雲綁架、陰謀敗露、最終對決；第五幕（收尾10%）：大團圓、懷孕、天庭反應。
structure.excerpt: Mom, it seems dad really is seriously ill... Doctor, you must give him the best treatment... It's over. Everything must have been exposed. Mom, don't worry. From now on, we'll all be here for you.

hooks.description: 以九天玄女在天庭打麻將贏錢的荒誕場景開場，瞬間建立角色的強大與不羈，隨即被閻王偷襲貶下凡間，製造巨大落差感，觀眾既好奇她的來歷又想看她如何翻盤。
hooks.excerpt: You'd better have something better than my pure hand, big monotone, consecutive Kong self-drawn to win all the king of hell's money... lady of the nine heavens, don't blame me. The entire heavenly court and underworld jointly petitioned to send you on this tribulation.

hooks.description: 女主的內心獨白被丈夫聽見，形成資訊不對稱的喜劇張力。觀眾知道女主在想什麼，丈夫也知道，但女主不知道丈夫知道，三重視角製造持續的懸念和笑點。
hooks.excerpt: Her mouth didn't move. So why can I hear her voice? Could it be this is her inner thoughts? Scared shitless. How is that possible?

hooks.description: 女主預言丈夫今天會有血光之災，丈夫不信並立下賭約，觀眾立刻進入倒計時緊張感，等待預言是否成真。
hooks.excerpt: Wrong Wong. I did the math. Today is not a good day for divorce. If you get divorced today, you're definitely going to have a bloody accident... If I have a bloody accident today, not only will I not divorce you, I'll even wash my hair upside down for you to see.

hooks.description: 九天玄女穿越到被全家嫌棄的醜女身上，天界最尊貴的存在變成凡間最卑微的棄女，極致反差激發觀眾的逆襲期待。
hooks.excerpt: Oh my blind and heartless future crippled and sent flying bedridden losing control of his bowels and bladder. Husband Ro Wong... Don't call me mom. I'm not your mother. You fake... How could I give birth to an ugly girl like you?

characters.type: 神仙穿越女主（外表醜女×內在仙尊）
characters.type_en: Transmigrated Celestial Goddess in Ugly Body
characters.description: 核心吸引力在於極致反差——外表被所有人嫌棄，內在卻是九天玄女，擁有讀心術、預知術、法術等超能力。性格不是傳統隱忍型，而是霸氣外露、毒舌搞笑、我行我素，打破觀眾對'醜女'角色的預期。
characters.excerpt: Want them? Have them all... The sky. It's raining kidneys. So scared. And you still dare to ask for kidneys?... I'm in a good mood today. Otherwise, that hand of yours. Probably wouldn't be staying on.

characters.description: 從嫌棄妻子外表、急於離婚，到被讀心術震驚，再到被女主能力和個性吸引，經典的'真香'轉變。嘴硬心軟，表面嫌棄實則心動。
characters.excerpt: I can't stand having an ugly woman within three steps of me. So, from now on, don't show your face in front of me... G Nanel, you really think I don't dare to sign, huh?... This marriage. I'm not getting a divorce.

characters.type: 綠茶白蓮花（回頭前任×商業女強人面具）
characters.description: 童黛表面溫柔體貼、事業有成，實際上一直監視男主、處心積慮搶位。被女主讀心術一一揭穿，是觀眾最愛恨的反派類型。
characters.excerpt: Nanja, I didn't mean to come between you and Wine... Is Tong Dai really having me watched?... She saw the Rome family was failing, found some excuse, and ran off abroad. Now that the Rome family is at its peak, she comes running back with all those green hats.

characters.description: 蘇雲是男主父親婚外情的私生子，表面忠誠實則覬覦家產，動機源自身份不公的怨恨，有一定的悲劇色彩但行為徹底黑化。
characters.excerpt: I'm the product of your father's affair with my mother. And yet, he refused to take me back. I was forced to live my whole life in the shadows, hiding my identity forever... Who wants to be your brother?

characters.type: 重男輕女惡毒原生家庭
characters.type_en: Toxic Birth Family Favoring Biological Daughter
characters.description: 紀家父母拋棄養女、偏愛親生女兒，是推動女主被迫嫁入豪門的原始動力，也是觀眾最渴望看到被打臉的對象。
characters.excerpt: Don't call me mom. I'm not your mother. You fake... For 20 years, I always said with my jeans. How could I give birth to an ugly girl like you?... Get out. From now on, the G family and you have nothing to do with each other.

character_combos.type: 霸總×仙女醜妻（嫌棄到真香）
character_combos.type_en: Domineering CEO × Celestial Ugly Wife (Disdain to True Love)
character_combos.description: 化學反應來自三層衝突：外表嫌棄vs能力折服、想離婚vs離不了、嘴上嫌棄vs心裡動搖。女主不卑不亢甚至更強勢，打破傳統灰姑娘的被動模式。讀心術設定讓男主能聽到女主的毒舌內心話，製造大量喜劇和曖昧。
character_combos.excerpt: Ganon Joe, you're testing my patience... G Nanjao, you're a woman. What goes on in that head of yours?... We shouldn't get divorced. Okay. Weird. Why is my heart beating so fast? I must have heart disease.

character_combos.type: 綠茶前任×正宮妻子（明爭暗鬥）
character_combos.type_en: Green Tea Ex × Legitimate Wife (Open and Covert Battle)
character_combos.description: 童黛vs紀南喬的對決是觀眾最愛的正宮手撕小三模式，但本劇的特殊之處在於女主用讀心術提前看穿對方每一步，讓觀眾享受'降維打擊'的爽感。
character_combos.excerpt: Namja, here it comes. She's about to say I didn't mean to come between you two... Mom. Mom. Mom, don't tell me she's right again... Her inner thoughts are real. Oh no. Mom, you can't get a divorce. This isn't a jinx. This is clearly the Rome family's living ancestor.

character_combos.type: 惡毒原生家庭×被拋棄女主
character_combos.description: 紀家的殘忍對待為女主的逆襲提供了最大的情緒燃料。觀眾會代入女主的委屈，等待她用實力反擊。
character_combos.excerpt: Dad, you mean the one who didn't believe me, kicked me out of the house, ignored 20 years of family ties, knocked me out, and dragged me to the hospital? That bastard.

settings.type_en: Hospital Room Confrontation in Wealthy Family
settings.description: 醫院場景集合了生死危機、家族利益博弈、情感考驗多重張力。車禍後的病房成為各方勢力角力的戰場——婆婆衡量利益、童黛趁虛而入、女主以退為進。
settings.excerpt: Multiple fractures all over his body. He might never be able to stand again... A year or so. That long. If he can walk in a year, I'll take his last name... Tong Dai really came. Wang, does it hurt?

settings.type: 天庭仙境×凡間豪門（雙世界設定）
settings.type_en: Celestial Court × Mortal Wealthy Family (Dual World Setting)
settings.description: 天庭場景提供喜劇和奇幻元素（打麻將、被偷襲下凡），凡間豪門提供現實衝突和爽點，兩個世界的切換讓劇情既有仙俠的趣味又有都市的爽感。
settings.excerpt: That damn king of hell. He actually ambushed me... Lord Yan, I was secretly protecting the ninth heaven goddess in the mortal realm... Oh no. That shevil is having a baby. What do we do?

settings.description: 離婚協議書成為權力博弈的道具，簽與不簽之間充滿張力。女主反覆用離婚作為籌碼，從被動接受到主動操控局面。
settings.excerpt: Sign here. Mrs. CEO sign what? I want you to tear up that divorce agreement... This divorce? I'm not getting a divorce... either stand on your head and wash your hair or get a divorce.

relationships.type: 假婚姻真動心（先婚後愛）
relationships.description: 因意外救了爺爺而被迫結婚，男方一心離婚，女方本也無所謂，但在共同經歷中逐漸產生真感情。衝突核心在於兩人都嘴硬不承認。
relationships.excerpt: I'm not divorcing you only because of our years of marriage... Weird. Why is my heart beating so fast? I must have heart disease. That's not heart disease. Xiao Xiao. You like me too, right? I do. I like R Wong. What a joke. No.

relationships.type_en: Illegitimate Son vs Legitimate Son (Brothers Turned Enemies)
relationships.description: 蘇雲與容王的關係是豪門恩怨的經典模式。一個在陽光下長大，一個在陰影中隱忍，身份不公導致的仇恨是不可調和的核心衝突。
relationships.excerpt: I considered you a brother. Who wants to be your brother?... You've been the lofty young master of the Rome family for so many years. And what about me?... Just because I'm a bastard, child.

relationships.type_en: Mother-in-Law and Daughter-in-Law: From Rivals to Allies
relationships.description: 婆婆從嫌棄醜媳婦、想換成童黛，到發現讀心術為真後視女主為家族活祖宗，完成態度大反轉，提供強烈的爽感。
relationships.excerpt: Her inner thoughts are real. Oh no. Mom, you can't get a divorce. This isn't a jinx. This is clearly the Rome family's living ancestor.

relationships.description: 童黛作為男主前任、與女主形成情敵關係，但本劇女主完全不吃醋也不示弱，反而用讀心術碾壓，打破傳統三角關係中正宮的被動地位。
relationships.excerpt: Hey, you better look closely. He is my man... Tom die... Actually, that's quite right. I dy would you like to stay for a simple meal?

payoffs.type: 讀心術揭穿綠茶真面目
payoffs.type_en: Mind-Reading Exposes Green Tea's True Colors
payoffs.description: 女主用讀心術提前預言童黛會說'我不是故意來插足的'，當童黛真的說出這句話時，婆婆的三觀被徹底顛覆，從想換媳婦變成緊抱女主大腿。觀眾享受的是'全知視角碾壓'的智商優越感。
payoffs.excerpt: Namja, here it comes. Here it comes. She's about to say I didn't mean to come between you two... Nanja, I didn't mean to come between you and Wine... Her inner thoughts are real. Oh no. Mom, you can't get a divorce. This is clearly the Rome family's living ancestor.

payoffs.description: 女主預言車禍→車禍真的發生→男主不得不履行賭約倒立洗頭。預言類打臉的爽感在於'我早就告訴你了'的驗證快感，加上賭約兌現的喜劇效果。
payoffs.excerpt: If I have a bloody accident today, not only will I not divorce you, I'll even wash my hair upside down for you to see... Watch out... ridiculous handstand hair wash. Even a dog wouldn't do that.

payoffs.description: 蘇雲多年佈局一朝敗露，綁架失敗被捕，童黛和紀家被送進警局。所有暗線在最後一刻全部收網，觀眾積累的憤怒在此刻得到完全釋放。
payoffs.excerpt: Su Yun, you're under arrest for kidnapping and financial fraud... With all the things you've done. I know all about them. You won't be out for 40 or 50 years... No, it can't be.

payoffs.type: 女主霸氣護夫反擊原生家庭
payoffs.type_en: Heroine's Fierce Counterattack Against Birth Family
payoffs.description: 面對曾經拋棄她的父親動手打人，女主直接還擊並威脅斷手，男主配合演戲不作證，夫妻聯手打臉惡父的場面極其解氣。
payoffs.excerpt: I'm in a good mood today. Otherwise, that hand of yours. Probably wouldn't be staying on... Oh, oops. I just got something in my eye. Didn't see a thing. My apologies. However, Mr. G, if you file a false police report, be careful you don't get locked up.

payoffs.description: 反派被清除後，女主懷孕的消息為全劇畫上圓滿句號，連天庭的閻王都要趕緊給男主加壽命，喜劇與溫馨並存。
payoffs.excerpt: Could it be you're pregnant? Really? A baby... Oh no. That shevil is having a baby. What do we do? I need to extend her husband's lifespan. If he dies, then no one will be able to control that she devil.

pacing.tempo: 快節奏密集反轉型，每3-5分鐘一個小高潮，甜寵與衝突交替出現
pacing.tension_curve: 開場即高張力（天庭打鬥+被原生家庭拋棄）→短暫舒緩（嫁入豪門）→持續攀升（離婚危機+車禍+讀心術揭露）→中段甜寵調節（夫妻互動/身體互換喜劇）→後段再次攀升（反派陰謀+綁架危機）→高潮爆發（全面收網）→溫馨收尾（懷孕大團圓）
key_beats: 九天玄女被貶下凡穿越到醜女身上
讀心術首次被男主發現
預言車禍成真、男主倒立洗頭
讀心術揭穿童黛、婆婆態度大逆轉
男女身體互換搞笑橋段
蘇雲綁架容百根、最終對決
pacing.excerpt: There's exactly 1 minute left. Stop. Stop the car... Ridiculous. One minute... Watch out... son. Oh, shares 10%. That's not a small amount... Mom, don't worry. From now on, we'll all be here for you.

dialogues.description: 女主面對攻擊時不隱忍、不哭泣，而是用更狠的話直接懟回去。套路是對方先發難→女主用更高維度的邏輯或力量碾壓回應，語氣輕鬆甚至帶笑，反差感極強。
dialogues.excerpt: Dad, you mean the one who didn't believe me, kicked me out of the house, ignored 20 years of family ties, knocked me out, and dragged me to the hospital? That bastard... I'm in a good mood today. Otherwise, that hand of yours. Probably wouldn't be staying on.

dialogues.description: 女主內心獨白與外在表現的反差構成雙層對白。外表沉默或微笑，內心瘋狂吐槽或揭露真相，被特定角色聽到後引發劇情轉折。這種對白讓觀眾有'上帝視角'的參與感。
dialogues.excerpt: A year or so. That long. If he can walk in a year, I'll take his last name. This accident damaged the very core. I'm afraid without 3 to 5 years, he'll be spending it in a wheelchair... Could it be that Geneo really saved Grandpa by accident and didn't plan it all along?

dialogues.description: 男女主在嘴硬和心軟之間反覆橫跳，用否認喜歡來表達喜歡，用嫌棄的語氣做甜蜜的事。核心套路是口是心非＋身體誠實。
dialogues.excerpt: You like me too, right? I do. I like R Wong. What a joke. No. Do you or don't you? No... Weird. Why is my heart beating so fast? I must have heart disease. That's not heart disease.

dialogues.description: 男主對外人發出保護妻子的強勢宣言，語氣冰冷有壓迫感。功能是宣示主權、展現男主實力、讓觀眾感受到'被保護'的安全感。
dialogues.excerpt: Let me make this clear one more time. No matter what, G Nanjao is a member of our wrong family. So if you dare lay a finger on her without permission again, even a single hair, I'll make the entire G family pay the price.

dialogues.description: 反派在被揭穿或失敗時的情緒爆發，暴露其真實動機和心理創傷。既讓觀眾解氣，又為角色增加一層深度。
dialogues.excerpt: You've been the lofty young master of the Rome family for so many years. And what about me? I'm the product of your father's affair with my mother... I was forced to live my whole life in the shadows, hiding my identity forever. Why? Just because I'm a bastard, child.

visual_scenes.description: 女主在車上倒數計時預言車禍，男主不信繼續開車，車禍瞬間發生。視覺上從車內緊張對話→急剎→碰撞→男主全身骨折躺在病床上，強烈的視覺衝擊驗證了女主的神力。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 倒計時營造的緊迫感、預言與現實的碰撞、從傲慢到慘痛的瞬間反轉
visual_scenes.excerpt: Oh, no. It's right about now. There's exactly 1 minute left. Stop. Stop the car... Ridiculous. One minute... Watch out... Multiple fractures all over his body. He might never be able to stand again.

visual_scenes.description: 全身骨折的霸總被迫兌現賭約，倒立洗頭的荒誕畫面既是喜劇高潮也是男主服軟的標誌性時刻。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 霸總的尊嚴vs賭約的約束力，喜劇效果與權力反轉並存
visual_scenes.excerpt: ridiculous handstand hair wash. Even a dog wouldn't do that. Just washing my hair. Perfect timing. I got into a car accident toda...

visual_scenes.description: 開場女主用法術讓天上下腎臟雨，嚇退想強取她器官的家人。荒誕的超現實畫面瞬間建立女主的強大和不可預測性。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 恐怖與荒誕的結合、弱者瞬間變強者的視覺震撼
visual_scenes.excerpt: Is this what you want?... Want them? Have them all... The sky. The sky. It's raining kidneys. So scared. And you still dare to ask for kidneys?

visual_scenes.description: 蘇雲持刀挾持容百根，女主衝上去擋刀保護家人，男主和警方同時到場收網。多方勢力匯聚在同一空間的對峙場面。
visual_scenes.dramatic_tension: 人質危機的生死壓力、正邪最終對決的視覺衝擊
visual_scenes.excerpt: Fine, I'll let him go. Unless you hand over the entire Rome Corporation to me... Sister-in-law. I'm coming to help you. Don't get in the way. I'll kill you. Look out... Su Yun, you're under arrest for kidnapping and financial fraud.

ending_hooks.description: 全劇以閻王得知女主懷孕後瘋狂給男主加壽命收尾，將凡間大團圓與天庭的慌亂形成喜劇反差。暗示故事並未結束——天庭仍在暗中干預，為可能的續集留下空間。
ending_hooks.excerpt: Oh no. That shevil is having a baby. What do we do? No. I need to extend her husband's lifespan. If he dies, then no one will be able to control that she devil. I'll add I'm adding adding adding more.

ending_hooks.description: 女主的九天玄女身份始終未向男主完全揭露，讀心術的秘密也未被正面攤開，為後續劇情保留了巨大的懸念空間。
ending_hooks.excerpt: Whoever invented this soul transfer talisman is a genius... Heaven and earth profound in yellow. The five elements gather their energy into my body by decree. Souls shift and swap.

tension_actions.description: 女主用法術從天上降下腎臟雨來嚇退逼她捐腎的家人。這個行為完全突破常規認知，用荒誕的超自然力量展現女主的不可控性，讓施暴者瞬間變成恐懼者。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 超現實的器官從天而降，恐怖與黑色幽默並存，瞬間翻轉權力關係
tension_actions.excerpt: Is this what you want?... Want them? Have them all... A monster... The sky. The sky. It's raining kidneys.

tension_actions.description: 女主面對原生父親的暴力，不僅擋住還直接打回去，物理層面的反擊是最直接的爽點表達。配合男主假裝沒看見的配合演出，形成夫妻聯手的默契感。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 弱者反打強者的視覺反轉，配合男主'我什麼都沒看到'的喜劇配合
tension_actions.excerpt: You ungrateful girl... I'm in a good mood today. Otherwise, that hand of yours. Probably wouldn't be staying on... Oh, oops. I just got something in my eye. Didn't see a thing.

tension_actions.description: 離婚協議書在劇中反覆出現，從被要求簽字→女主主動要求籤→男主撕毀不離婚，每次出現都代表權力關係的轉變。紙張的撕裂是決定性時刻的視覺符號。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 紙張撕裂的動作象徵關係的決定性轉折，從婚姻危機到婚姻確認
tension_actions.excerpt: Sign here. Mrs. CEO sign what? I want you to tear up that divorce agreement... This divorce? I'm not getting a divorce.

tension_actions.description: 女主用法術與男主互換身體，製造大量尷尬和喜劇情境（女主在男體中想量尺寸、男主在女體中害羞），既是搞笑橋段也推進了感情線。
tension_actions.visual_impact: 性別錯位帶來的視覺喜劇，角色用對方身體做出反差行為
tension_actions.excerpt: Set. Heaven and earth profound in yellow... What did you do to me?... I've always wanted to find a man body to play around with. It's only 20 minutes... where are you going? I'm going to look for a ruler. You wouldn't dare.

genres.description: 以修仙世界觀為基底，九天玄女穿越到現代都市，仙俠元素（法術、天庭、閻王）與現代場景碰撞產生獨特的喜劇效果和爽感。核心受眾是喜歡'金手指'設定的觀眾。
主要衝突發生在現代豪門家族中，涉及家產爭奪、商業博弈、婆媳關係、婚姻危機等經典都市豪門元素。滿足觀眾對上流社會生活的窺探慾和對豪門恩怨的吃瓜慾。

styles.description: 核心調性是'爽'——女主從第一集就開掛，讀心術+法術+預知能力讓她碾壓所有對手，觀眾享受的是毫無懸念的降維打擊快感。不需要觀眾擔心女主會吃虧。
男女主的互動從嫌棄到甜蜜，大量嘴硬心軟、口是心非的糖分橋段。男主護妻、女主撩漢的甜蜜互動調節了衝突劇情的緊張節奏。
仙女vs現代常識的認知錯位（不會繫安全帶）、讀心術的尷尬場面、身體互換的荒誕喜劇、天庭眾仙的慌張反應，全劇充滿密集笑點。

analysis.title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
